task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Jaguar F-Pace (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $57000.00 and wholesale is $41920.00. Product features: Luxury crossover with sporty handling and premium British design. Reference: https://www.jaguarusa.com/all-models/f-pace/index.html

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Jaguar F-Pace. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Jaguar F-Pace. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
